task_completion.description: Create the US Treasury bond security with the correct name and ISIN.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a security named 'US Treasury 3.5% Nov 2028' with ISIN 'US91282CJL54' in the securities list or edit dialog.

task_completion.description: Record the purchase of 10 shares at 985.00.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a 'Buy' transaction in the 'Bond Depot'/'Bond Account' dated 2024-01-15 for 10 shares at a price of 985.00 (Total: 9,850.00).

task_completion.description: Document the first semi-annual interest payment.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for an 'Interest' transaction in the 'Bond Account' dated 2024-05-15 for the amount of 175.00.

task_completion.description: Document the second semi-annual interest payment.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for an 'Interest' transaction in the 'Bond Account' dated 2024-11-15 for the amount of 175.00.

task_completion.description: Record manual historical prices for the security.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the 'Historical Quotes' or 'Prices' view of the security showing entries for 2024-01-15 (985.00), 2024-06-15 (992.50), and 2024-12-15 (997.50).

task_completion.description: Save all updates to the original portfolio file.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the agent clicking 'File' -> 'Save', using the save icon, or the absence of an asterisk (*) next to 'bond_portfolio.xml' in the application title bar at the end of the trajectory.

integrity.description: The agent used the Portfolio Performance GUI application.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the Portfolio Performance application interface being used, not a text editor modifying the XML file directly.

integrity.description: The agent manually entered the data into the application.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show intermediate steps of data entry, such as open dialog boxes for 'Add Security', 'Buy', 'Interest', and 'Historical Quotes'.

integrity.description: The agent did not use scripts to bypass the GUI.
integrity.visual_evidence: There should be no terminal windows showing Python, bash, or sed commands being used to modify 'bond_portfolio.xml'.
